levels.who_is_forced: High turnover strike; can act as a battle line where hedging and speculation concentrate.
levels.breach: If breached, hedging demand can increase and price can travel faster toward the next call concentration.
levels.rejection: On rejection, price often snaps back toward the nearest high OI cluster closer to spot.

levels.who_is_forced: Dealers hedging put exposure; liquidation pressure can increase if support breaks.
levels.breach: If breached, hedging flows can add pressure and price can travel faster toward the next put concentration.
levels.rejection: On rejection, price often snaps back toward the nearest high OI cluster closer to spot.

levels.who_is_forced: Dealers hedging call exposure; momentum chasers may get pulled in on breach.

verdict.regime_flip: Structure flips if $13.00 is breached because dealer hedging reverses direction at that OI concentration.
